onboarding.pageSubtitle: Let's get your store online in minutes. Follow the steps below to start selling.
onboarding.helpSubtitle: Our support team prepared a complete guide for beginners.

store.title: Create Your Store
store.description: Give your store a name to get started. You can add more details later from the settings.

profile.title: Configure Profile
profile.description: Define your brand identity, add your logo and fill in essential contact information.

product.title: Add First Product
product.description: Register the first item you will sell. Add attractive photos, detailed description and price.

dashboard.title: Understand the Panel
dashboard.description: Take a guided tour of the dashboard to learn how to manage your orders, inventory and view reports.
